mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, transport, command, args, env_vars as envVars, url, headers, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_mcp_servers where user_name = #{userName} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_mcp_servers (id, user_name, name, transport, command, args, env_vars, url, headers, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{name}, #{transport}, #{command}, #{args}, #{envVars}, #{url}, #{headers}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_mcp_servers where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, transport, command, args, env_vars as envVars, url, headers, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_mcp_servers where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update zephyr_mcp_servers set status = #{status} where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, server_id as serverId, tool_name as toolName, description, parameters_json as parametersJson, enabled, source, created_at as createdAt from zephyr_mcp_tools where server_id = #{serverId} and user_name = #{userName} order by source desc, tool_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_mcp_tools (id, user_name, server_id, tool_name, description, parameters_json, enabled, source, created_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{serverId}, #{toolName}, #{description}, #{parametersJson}, #{enabled}, #{source}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_mcp_tools where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
delete from zephyr_mcp_tools where server_id = #{serverId} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.update: update zephyr_mcp_tools set enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select count(*) from zephyr_mcp_tools where user_name = #{userName} and enabled = 1

select t.id, t.user_name as userName, t.server_id as serverId, t.tool_name as toolName, t.description, t.parameters_json as parametersJson, t.enabled, t.source, t.created_at as createdAt from zephyr_mcp_tools t inner join zephyr_mcp_servers s on s.id = t.server_id and s.user_name = t.user_name where t.user_name = #{userName} and t.enabled = 1 and s.status = 'connected' order by t.source desc, t.tool_name asc

select t.id, t.user_name as userName, t.server_id as serverId, t.tool_name as toolName, t.description, t.parameters_json as parametersJson, t.enabled, t.source, t.created_at as createdAt from zephyr_mcp_tools t inner join zephyr_mcp_servers s on s.id = t.server_id and s.user_name = t.user_name where t.user_name = #{userName} and s.status = 'connected' order by t.source desc, t.tool_name asc
